zh.lifeSummary: 當Bourgondie de Craon de Nevers於1062年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延可拉奧時，她的父親Robert de Nevers 1st Lord of Craon28歲，母親Blanche Avoise d Alençon DE CHATEAUDUN37歲。她與Aimeri III Malemort de Rancon結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1098年在法國努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安藍可享年37歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bourgondie de Craon de Nevers于1062年出生在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延可拉奧时，她的父亲Robert de Nevers 1st Lord of Craon28岁，母亲Blanche Avoise d Alençon DE CHATEAUDUN37岁。她与Aimeri III Malemort de Rancon结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1098年在法国努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安藍可享年37岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Craon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Krahn
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Gerd, Gerhard, Hans, Hans-Peter, Horst, Irmgard, Mathias, Otto, Wilhelm, Willi.
German: nickname for a tall, slim long-legged person, from Middle Low German krane ‘crane’. Compare Kranich .

en.lifeSummary: When Bourgondie de Craon de Nevers was born in 1062, in Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, her father, Robert de Nevers 1st Lord of Craon, was 28 and her mother, Blanche Avoise d Alençon DE CHATEAUDUN, was 37. She married Aimeri III Malemort de Rancon. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1098, in Rancon, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bourgondie de Craon de Nevers est née en 1062, à Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Robert de Nevers 1st Lord of Craon, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Blanche Avoise d Alençon DE CHATEAUDUN, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Aimeri III Malemort de Rancon. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1098, à Rancon, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 37 ans.

de.Craon, 53084, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire,: Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Bourgondie de Craon de Nevers 1062 in Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Nevers 1st Lord of Craon 28 und ihre Mutter Blanche Avoise d Alençon DE CHATEAUDUN 37. Sie hat Aimeri III Malemort de Rancon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1098 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Rancon, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bourgondie de Craon de Nevers è nata il nel 1062 nel Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia, sua padre, Robert de Nevers 1st Lord of Craon, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Blanche Avoise d Alençon DE CHATEAUDUN, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Aimeri III Malemort de Rancon. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1098, nel Rancon, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, all'età di 37 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Bourgondie de Craon de Neversが1062年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメイエンクラオンで生まれた時，父Robert de Nevers 1st Lord of Craonは28歳，母Blanche Avoise d Alençon DE CHATEAUDUNは37歳であった。Aimeri III Malemort de Ranconと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1098年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインハウテ-ヴィエンランコンで37歳で死去した。

ko.Craon, 53084, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire,: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 크라
ko.lifeSummary: Bourgondie de Craon de Nevers(이)가 1062년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 크라에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Nevers 1st Lord of Craon(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Blanche Avoise d Alençon DE CHATEAUDUN(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 Aimeri III Malemort de Rancon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1098년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 하테-비니 랭콘에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bourgondie de Craon de Nevers nasceu em 1062, em Craon, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, França, seu pai, Robert de Nevers 1st Lord of Craon, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Blanche Avoise d Alençon DE CHATEAUDUN, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Aimeri III Malemort de Rancon. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1098, em Rancon, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, com 37 anos.

ru.Craon, 53084, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire,: краон, меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bourgondie de Craon de Nevers родилась в 1062 г. в местности краон, меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, её отцу по имени Robert de Nevers 1st Lord of Craon было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Blanche Avoise d Alençon DE CHATEAUDUN, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Aimeri III Malemort de Rancon. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1098 г. в местности ранкон, хауте-виенн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 37 лет.

Se casó con Aimeri III Malemort de Rancon. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1098, en Rancon, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, a la edad de 37 años.
